title: ICARION v1.1 Configuration
description: Complete configuration schema for ICARION ion trajectory simulations (v1.1+ with waveform support)

title.description: Optional human-readable title for the simulation run

species_database_path.description: Path to the species database file (JSON/HDF5)

ion_cloud_path.description: Path to initial ion cloud distribution file (HDF5)

ions.description: Ion initialization configuration (optional, alternative to ion_cloud_path)

waveforms.description: Named waveform library (v1.1+, optional). Define waveforms once and reference with @waveform_id
